---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Peer-reviewed articles and Conference presentations"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents:
      - peer-reviewed.yml
      - conference.yml
    template: ../_templates/publication-card.ejs
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 200
---

::: {#publications}
:::
